flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.5% at Humphreys University-Stockton and Modesto Campuses exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($25.0k debt amortized over 10 years vs $39.2k earnings).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Humphreys University-Stockton and Modesto Campuses rose 39% between 2007 and 2010 ($6.8k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Humphreys University-Stockton and Modesto Campuses fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (100.0% → 66.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Humphreys University-Stockton and Modesto Campuses fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (72.2% → 61.5%).
